title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 276.080 - When deemed guilty of a misdemeanor — subject to fine
text:
276.080.  When deemed guilty of a misdemeanor — subject to fine. — Any person, firm or corporation violating any provision of sections 276.010 to 276.080 shall be deemed guilty of a misdemeanor, and, upon conviction, shall be fined for each offense not less than one thousand dollars nor more than ten thousand dollars.
(RSMo 1939 § 14390) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 12732
